hero.text: I build responsive, user-friendly and applications with a focus on performance and desgin. Let's bring your ideas to life.

content.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develop and maintain web applications using technologies such as React, Node.js, and Laravel.
Design and implement responsive user interfaces and back-end systems.
Work on custom WordPress themes and plugins for various clients.
Handle end-to-end project management, from client consultation to deployment.
Integrate third-party APIs and services to enhance application functionality.
Ensure high performance and scalability of applications through code optimization.

content.title: WordPress Developer
description: Developed a restaurant website using WordPress and Elementor.
Customized themes and plugins to meet client needs.
Enhanced the site's design for user-friendly navigation and responsiveness.
Worked on content integration and basic SEO improvements.

content.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Earned a diploma in Full Stack Development.
Gained expertise in MERN stack, UML, Agile methodology, Laravel, API development, Redux Toolkit, data management, and MongoDB.
Worked on cloud-native technologies and modern development practices.

content.title: Polyvalent Employee
description: Handled various roles including customer service, food preparation, and cash register operations.
Ensured high standards of cleanliness and adherence to food safety regulations.
Provided excellent customer service and resolved issues promptly.

content.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Completed coursework in algorithms using Python.
Learned front-end technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, and jQuery.
Studied SQL, MySQL, PHP, and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).

content.title: Chemistry
description: Completed coursework in fundamental and advanced chemistry topics.
Gained practical laboratory experience and conducted experiments.
Developed skills in analytical and quantitative techniques.

content.title: Life and Earth Sciences
description: Graduated with a focus on Life and Earth Sciences.
Studied core subjects including Mathematics, Physics, and Life and Earth Sciences.
